markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review launch performance and align on immediate priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=46.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Onboarding is a critical blocker.** A bug creating empty workspaces and the difficulty of fixing a wrong category selection are the top user-facing issues.](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=1392.0)
  - [**Analytics tracking is broken.** The `event_checkout_completed` event is incorrectly logging signups, showing 0 conversions. A new, accurate event is required to fix the dashboard.](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=287.0)
  - [**Customer.io is migrating to the US.** This move is required because email zones are tied to individual accounts, not workspaces. The new US campaign needs Jason's review before go-live.](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)
  - [**Impersonation is live but needs controls.** The new feature lacks logging and expiration, creating a regulatory risk (especially in Europe) and requiring a formal access policy.](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=1117.0)

## Topics

### Onboarding & Workspace Issues

  - [**Empty Workspaces Bug:**](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=1392.0)
      - [**Problem:** New users get empty workspaces because \~2,000 shared library prompts added after November lack the `leaderboard` tag. The onboarding logic incorrectly relies on this tag to bootstrap workspaces.](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=1392.0)
      - [**Fix:** Estevão will modify the bootstrap process to add *all* active shared library prompts, ignoring the tag for now.](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=1392.0)
  - [**Empty Subcategories:**](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=1526.0)
      - [**Problem:** Marcel is creating new subcategories, which can appear in the onboarding dropdown before prompts are added, leading to a poor user experience.](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=1526.0)
      - [**Interim Fix:** Estevão will hide subcategories from the dropdown if they contain no prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=1588.0)
      - [**Long-Term Fix:** A "draft/publish" status for categories is needed to prevent this.](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=1579.0)
  - [**Incorrect Category Selection:**](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=2148.0)
      - [**Problem:** Users get stuck if they select the wrong product category, as there's no way to change it. This is a critical issue because the entire product experience depends on this initial choice.](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=2148.0)
      - [**Solution:** Stevie will create a doc today outlining the problem and potential solutions, including:](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=2807.0)
          - [An "escape hatch" in onboarding to flag incorrect categories.](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=2418.0)
          - [Inferring categories from competitor selections.](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=2515.0)
          - [Using mention data to suggest categories.](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=2668.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Jason is driving new users, and this issue is a major source of friction.](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=2418.0)

### Analytics & Tracking

  - [**Broken Signup Conversion Funnel:**](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
      - [**Problem:** The `event_checkout_completed` event is incorrectly used to track onboarding completion, causing the dashboard to show 0 conversions.](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=287.0)
      - [**Solution:** Estevão will add a new, accurate event for onboarding completion.](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
  - [**User Behavior Insights:**](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)
      - [**Finding:** Users are actively engaged post-onboarding.](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)
      - [**Metric:** \~13 accounts have changed their competitors, and \~13 have customized their prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)

### System & Infrastructure

  - [**Customer.io US Migration:**](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)
      - [**Problem:** Customer.io's email zones are tied to individual accounts, not workspaces, requiring a US instance to send emails from the correct region.](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=974.0)
      - [**Status:** Pedro has created a US account, cloned the welcome campaign, and connected RudderStack.](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=974.0)
      - [**Action:** Jason must review the new US campaign before go-live.](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)
  - [**Impersonation Feature:**](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=1057.0)
      - [**Status:** Pedro implemented a quick impersonation feature for Marcel to view user workspaces.](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=1057.0)
      - [**Risk:** The current implementation lacks logging and expiration, creating a regulatory risk, particularly in Europe.](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)
      - [**Action:** A formal access policy is needed.](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)
  - [**Weekend On-Call:**](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=1776.0)
      - [**Decision:** No formal rotation is needed yet. The team will use informal communication to ensure coverage.](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=1776.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Estevão:**](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=1392.0)
      - [Fix the onboarding bootstrap logic to add all shared library prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=1392.0)
      - [Hide empty subcategories from the onboarding dropdown.](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=1588.0)
      - [Add a new, accurate event for onboarding completion.](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
  - [**Stevie:**](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=1882.0)
      - [Create a doc outlining the category selection problem and potential solutions.](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=2807.0)
      - [Organize the "post-launch" backlog.](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=1882.0)
  - [**Jason:**](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=2862.0)
      - [Review the new Customer.io US welcome campaign.](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=2862.0)
  - [**Jose:**](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=813.0)
      - [Complete the cadence feature to reduce infrastructure spend.](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=813.0)
  - [**Pedro:**](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)
      - [Provide Jason with the checklist for the Customer.io US migration.](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=2862.0)
